question:
Why is punctuality generally respected in professional cultures?
A) It proves that a person has no personal life.
B) It is the only way to prove you own a watch.
C) It demonstrates reliability and shows respect for the time and schedules of colleagues.
D) It ensures that meetings will finish early.
